note: Layer-2 acceptance for the spec-status<->PR-state parity gate — the T3 slice shipped as PR #189. The behavioral surface is the CI check itself; each item is a deterministic script run against a real PR, or the workflow run on GitHub Actions.

items.title: Gate FIRES on a real PR that sets a spec to a done status while unmerged
items.precondition: gh authenticated; real open PR #180 has a diff that adds Completed
items.expected: exit 1 — 'PR #180 sets a "done" status ... but the PR is OPEN (not merged)'
items.evidence: Ran against real open PR #180: FAIL, exit 1, naming plans/07172026-isolated-test-worktree-adapter/spec.html.

items.title: Gate PASSES a PR that merely brushes a finished plan folder (no spec change)
items.precondition: Real open PR #179 touches plans/07142026-alloro-funnel-engine/funnel-feature-sequence.md but not its spec.html
items.expected: exit 0 — 'sets no spec.html to a done status — nothing to assert'
items.evidence: Ran against real open PR #179: exit 0. This was the reproduced day-one false positive; now passes.

items.title: Gate PASSES a PR that sets a spec to a non-done status
items.precondition: Real open PR #186 modifies its spec.html to 'In Progress'
items.evidence: Ran against real open PR #186: exit 0.

items.title: Residual closed — gate PASSES a non-status edit of an already-Completed spec
items.precondition: Throwaway fixture PR #190: base branch already held a Completed spec, head only appended a Rev note (pill unchanged)
items.expected: exit 0 — the pill line is not an added line, so nothing is asserted
items.evidence: Ran against real fixture PR #190: exit 0. The prior touch-based version would have false-fired here. Fixture PR closed and both branches deleted after proving.

items.title: Workflow runs green in real CI and the parity step executes
steps: 2. Read the 'PR Spec Checks' run on #189
items.expected: run conclusion success; parity step logs its verdict; guarded pr-log step logs its skip
items.evidence: GitHub Actions run completed/success on #189: parity step logged 'PR #189 sets no spec.html to a done status — nothing to assert'; PR-LOG step logged the guarded skip.

items.title: pr-log --check step stays a loud no-op until its script lands on the base
items.precondition: scripts/pr-log.sh not yet on dev/dave (ships via PR #181)
steps: 1. Read the PR-LOG step log on the #189 run
items.expected: 'PR-LOG check skipped — scripts/pr-log.sh is not on the base branch yet'
items.evidence: Confirmed in the #189 run log. Step arms automatically once #181 merges.
